metadata.name: Adversarial Behavior Pattern Library
metadata.description: 社交网络对抗行为模式知识库，用于意图引导的对抗社区搜索
metadata.author: 基于Botometer、TwiBot-20、CIB研究等多源整合

account_anomaly.name: 账号特征异常
account_anomaly.description: 账号创建、资料、身份等方面的异常特征

temporal_anomaly.name: 时间行为异常
temporal_anomaly.description: 发帖时间、活跃规律等时间维度的异常

content_anomaly.name: 内容特征异常
content_anomaly.description: 发布内容、话题、语言等方面的异常

network_structure.name: 网络结构异常
network_structure.description: 社交网络拓扑结构方面的异常

interaction_anomaly.name: 交互行为异常
interaction_anomaly.description: 转发、点赞、评论等交互行为的异常

coordination.name: 协调行为
coordination.description: 多账号协同配合的行为模式

evasion.name: 规避检测
evasion.description: 故意规避检测系统的行为模式

adversarial_community.name: 对抗社区特征
adversarial_community.description: 对抗性群体的整体特征（本研究核心）

patterns.name: 账号批量创建
patterns.description: 多个账号在短时间内集中创建，创建时间高度聚集
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts created within a short time window
detection_signals: 创建时间间隔小于24小时
初始行为模式高度相似

patterns.name: 虚假身份信息
patterns.description: 使用虚构的个人信息，包括假名、假照片、假地理位置
patterns.description_en: Using fabricated personal information including fake names and photos
detection_signals: 地理位置与语言使用不匹配

patterns.name: 资料不完整
patterns.description: 账号资料信息不完整，使用默认头像或缺少个人简介
patterns.description_en: Incomplete profile with default avatar or missing bio

patterns.name: 用户名异常
patterns.description: 用户名包含大量随机数字或无意义字符组合
patterns.description_en: Username contains random numbers or meaningless character combinations

patterns.name: 账号年龄与活跃度不匹配
patterns.description: 新账号表现出与其年龄不符的高活跃度或影响力
patterns.description_en: New accounts showing activity levels inconsistent with their age
detection_signals: 新账号短期内获得大量关注
账号创建后立即高频发帖

patterns.name: 发帖时间高度规律
patterns.description: 发帖时间呈现机械式规律，如固定间隔发帖
patterns.description_en: Posting times show mechanical regularity with fixed intervals
detection_signals: 发帖时间间隔标准差极小

patterns.name: 异常活跃时段
patterns.description: 在非正常时间段（如凌晨2-5点）持续保持高活跃度
patterns.description_en: Continuously active during abnormal hours like 2-5 AM
detection_signals: 活跃时段与声称地理位置不符

patterns.name: 多账号时间同步
patterns.description: 多个账号在相同时间窗口内同时活跃或执行相同操作
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts active or performing same actions in the same time window

patterns.name: 爆发式活动
patterns.description: 平时沉默或低活跃，在特定事件时突然集中爆发活动
patterns.description_en: Usually dormant but suddenly bursting with activity during specific events
detection_signals: 活跃度突然增加10倍以上
爆发时间与热点事件对齐

patterns.name: 快速响应
patterns.description: 对特定内容的响应速度异常快，超出正常人类反应时间
patterns.description_en: Abnormally fast response to specific content beyond normal human reaction time
detection_signals: 转发速度超出阅读时间

patterns.name: 内容高度模板化
patterns.description: 发布内容呈现明显的模板特征，仅有微小变化
patterns.description_en: Published content shows obvious template features with only minor variations
detection_signals: 结构完全一致仅词汇不同

patterns.name: 主题高度集中
patterns.description: 只关注极少数特定话题，缺乏正常用户的兴趣多样性
patterns.description_en: Only focusing on very few specific topics, lacking normal user interest diversity

patterns.name: 情感极化表达
patterns.description: 内容情感表达极端，要么极度正面要么极度负面
patterns.description_en: Extremely positive or negative emotional expression in content
detection_signals: 情感分数处于极值区间
大量使用情感强烈词汇

patterns.name: 使用隐语暗号
patterns.description: 使用特定的隐语、暗号或符号进行隐蔽沟通
patterns.description_en: Using specific code words, signals or symbols for covert communication
detection_signals: 上下文语义不通但特定群体能理解

patterns.name: 转发比例异常高
patterns.description: 转发内容占比远高于原创，几乎没有个人原创观点
patterns.description_en: Retweet content ratio far exceeds original content with almost no personal views

patterns.name: 内容与身份不符
patterns.description: 发布内容与账号声称的身份、地理位置、职业等不符
patterns.description_en: Published content inconsistent with claimed identity, location, or profession
detection_signals: 声称本地人但内容显示外地视角
专业领域内容出现常识错误
语言习惯与声称背景不符

patterns.name: 跨语言异常
patterns.description: 同一账号使用多种语言，或语言使用与地理位置不符
patterns.description_en: Same account using multiple languages or language inconsistent with location

patterns.name: 内部连接刻意稀疏
patterns.description: 群体成员之间刻意减少直接关注或互动关系
patterns.description_en: Group members deliberately reduce direct following or interaction relationships
detection_signals: 内部连接密度显著低于随机图
成员间直接边数异常少
内聚系数远低于正常社区

patterns.name: 共享异常邻居
patterns.description: 无直接连接但共享大量共同关注或共同粉丝
patterns.description_en: No direct connection but sharing many common followings or followers
detection_signals: 共同关注列表相似度大于50%

patterns.name: 互关小团体
patterns.description: 形成紧密互相关注的小团体，团体内密度极高
patterns.description_en: Forming tight mutual-follow cliques with extremely high internal density

patterns.name: 粉丝关注比异常
patterns.description: 关注数远多于粉丝数，或粉丝数异常增长
patterns.description_en: Following count far exceeds follower count, or abnormal follower growth

patterns.name: 通过中间节点通信
patterns.description: 不直接连接但通过特定中间节点传递信息
patterns.description_en: Not directly connected but passing information through specific intermediary nodes
detection_signals: 存在多个共同的中间节点

patterns.name: 星型网络结构
patterns.description: 多个账号围绕一个或少数核心账号形成星型结构
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts forming star structure around one or few core accounts
detection_signals: 边缘节点只与中心连接

patterns.name: 跨群组渗透
patterns.description: 成员分散加入多个不同群组，但彼此间保持隐蔽联系
patterns.description_en: Members dispersed across multiple groups but maintaining covert connections
detection_signals: 同一批账号出现在多个群组
群组间无明显关联但成员重叠
在不同群组发布相似内容

patterns.name: 协同转发
patterns.description: 多个账号在短时间内集中转发相同或高度相似的内容
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts retweeting same or highly similar content in short time
detection_signals: 转发时间间隔小于5分钟

patterns.name: 协同点赞
patterns.description: 多个账号对特定内容进行集中点赞以提升其可见度
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts liking specific content to boost its visibility
detection_signals: 点赞来源账号特征相似
点赞数与自然传播不符

patterns.name: 评论话术接力
patterns.description: 评论区出现固定模式的话术，像接力一样配合
patterns.description_en: Fixed pattern scripts appearing in comments like a relay
detection_signals: 评论逻辑像在对话配合

patterns.name: 互动与连接不符
patterns.description: 语义互动频繁但拓扑连接稀少（说得多连得少）
patterns.description_en: Frequent semantic interactions but sparse topological connections
detection_signals: 互动频率/连接强度比值高
内容相似但无社交关系

patterns.name: 单向互动模式
patterns.description: 只对特定目标进行单向互动，不与其他用户交流
patterns.description_en: Only interacting with specific targets unidirectionally

patterns.name: 异常@提及
patterns.description: 在内容中大量@提及其他用户，尤其是高影响力用户
patterns.description_en: Massively mentioning other users especially high-influence ones in content

patterns.name: 分布式攻击
patterns.description: 多个账号从不同角度对同一目标发起攻击
patterns.description_en: Multiple accounts attacking the same target from different angles
detection_signals: 多账号同时攻击同一目标
攻击角度不同但目标一致

patterns.name: 正反双簧
patterns.description: 不同账号分别扮演正反两方，制造虚假讨论氛围
patterns.description_en: Different accounts playing opposite sides to create fake discussion atmosphere
detection_signals: 争论吸引大量围观但无实质内容

patterns.name: 信息级联放大
patterns.description: 通过多层级转发形成信息级联，人为放大传播效果
patterns.description_en: Forming information cascade through multi-level retweeting to amplify spread
detection_signals: 每一级都有多个节点参与

patterns.name: 话题劫持
patterns.description: 利用热门话题标签传播无关或恶意内容
patterns.description_en: Using trending hashtags to spread irrelevant or malicious content
detection_signals: 内容与话题标签不相关
在多个热门标签下发布相同内容

patterns.name: 跨平台协同
patterns.description: 在多个社交平台同步发布相同内容或执行相同行动
patterns.description_en: Synchronously publishing same content or executing same actions across platforms
detection_signals: 不同平台账号特征相似

patterns.name: 养号行为
patterns.description: 定期发布正常内容维持账号活跃度和可信度
patterns.description_en: Regularly posting normal content to maintain account activity and credibility
detection_signals: 日常内容与攻击内容风格差异大
有规律地发布无害内容

patterns.name: 刻意分散隐藏
patterns.description: 故意不互相关注，分散在不同群组，避免被关联
patterns.description_en: Deliberately not following each other, dispersed in different groups to avoid association
detection_signals: 行为相似但网络距离远
无共同社交圈但内容相关
刻意避免任何直接连接

patterns.name: 模仿正常用户
patterns.description: 模仿正常用户的行为模式，包括发帖频率、内容多样性等
patterns.description_en: Mimicking normal user behavior patterns including posting frequency and content diversity
detection_signals: 行为指标接近正常分布

patterns.name: 使用代理IP
patterns.description: 使用代理IP或VPN隐藏真实地理位置
patterns.description_en: Using proxy IPs or VPNs to hide real geographic location

patterns.name: 内容变体生成
patterns.description: 对相同核心信息进行改写生成多个变体，规避内容检测
patterns.description_en: Rewriting same core information to generate variants to evade content detection

patterns.name: 低频慢速操作
patterns.description: 降低操作频率，避免触发基于频率的检测机制
patterns.description_en: Reducing operation frequency to avoid triggering frequency-based detection
detection_signals: 操作频率刚好低于阈值

patterns.name: 拓扑弱内聚
patterns.description: 社区内部的网络连接密度显著低于正常社区
patterns.description_en: Internal network connection density significantly lower than normal communities
detection_signals: 平均度数远低于全局平均

patterns.name: 语义高度一致
patterns.description: 尽管拓扑稀疏，但成员发布内容在语义上高度一致
patterns.description_en: Despite sparse topology, members' content is semantically highly consistent
detection_signals: 使用相同的关键词集合

patterns.name: 结构隐匿
patterns.description: 社区成员被其他正常大型社区所掩盖，难以识别
patterns.description_en: Community members hidden by other normal large communities, difficult to identify
detection_signals: 成员分散在多个正常社区中
常规社区检测算法无法发现

patterns.name: 意图驱动行为
patterns.description: 行为模式与特定对抗意图高度相关
patterns.description_en: Behavior patterns highly correlated with specific adversarial intent
detection_signals: 行为与查询意图匹配度高
活动时间与目标事件相关
内容针对特定对象或话题

patterns.name: 快速组建与解散
patterns.description: 群体快速组建执行任务后迅速解散消失
patterns.description_en: Groups quickly formed to execute tasks then rapidly dissolved
detection_signals: 群组存在时间短于一周

patterns.name: 层级化组织
patterns.description: 存在明显的指挥层级，核心节点指挥边缘节点
patterns.description_en: Clear command hierarchy with core nodes directing peripheral nodes
detection_signals: 核心节点先发布边缘节点后跟进

patterns.name: 任务分工明确
patterns.description: 不同成员承担不同角色和任务，分工协作
patterns.description_en: Different members taking different roles and tasks with division of labor
detection_signals: 不同账号行为模式不同但互补
有的负责生产内容有的负责传播

patterns.name: 冗余备份机制
patterns.description: 存在备用账号，主账号被封后备用账号接替
patterns.description_en: Backup accounts exist to take over when main accounts are suspended
detection_signals: 新账号行为与被封账号相似
存在多个高度相似的账号
一个被封立刻有新的出现

patterns.name: 外部连接作为掩护
patterns.description: 与大量正常用户建立连接作为掩护，稀释可疑特征
patterns.description_en: Establishing connections with many normal users as cover to dilute suspicious features
detection_signals: 与正常用户有大量单向关注
外部连接远多于内部连接

pattern_embeddings_info.description: 模式嵌入向量需要使用文本编码器生成
pattern_embeddings_info.usage: 使用description字段或name+description拼接作为编码输入
